from dsl import *

    x1 = objects(I, T, T, T)
    x2 = totuple(x1)
    x3 = rbind(subgrid, I)
    x4 = apply(x3, x2)
    x5 = apply(vmirror, x4)
    x6 = papply(equality, x4, x5)
    x7 = pair(x4, x6)
